title: A Variant Account
description: According to Muhammad b. 'Ubayd al-Muharibi-'Abd al-'Aziz b. Abi Hazim-his father: Someone said to Sahl b. Sa'd,42 "A certain governor of Medina intends to send to you (ordering you to) abuse 'Ali from the minbar." He said, "What shall I say?" The man replied, "Say Abu Turab." Sa'd said, "By God, nobody called him that but the Messenger of God." I said, "How was that, 0 Abu al-'Abbas?" Sa'd replied, "'Ali went to pay a visit to Fatimah, and then came out and lay down in the shadow of the mosque.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
